response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role demands 8+ years of C++ and 5+ years building large-scale distributed infrastructure/cloud compute platforms. Resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (~6 months) and primarily web/product work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or formal tech-lead role at the required scale.
strengths: Long tenure at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) with full-stack breadth
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, workshops
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Effectively lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience
No evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed infrastructure ownership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Missing cloud compute platform / distributed infra background
Senior engineering tenure at Google and Meta
